title: Lethality - A Terramity Addon
description: A Terramity addon that adds some weapons from the Terraria Calamity mod.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86dfac6f7788060b79260e48d81d2d9c6b9043ba.png)

# **_« Hand it over. That thing, your Dark Soul. »_**

This mod is an addon for Terramity, it adds various weapons from the Calamity mod (originally from Terraria) and tries to implement them in a vanilla-ish way.

Have in mind that  nothing is final and there can be some important changes in the future! Especially related to balance and crafting recipes.

Even though it's not required, it is **_HEAVILY_** recommended to play with Better Combat since the way most weapons work is basically meant to be played with it.

If you find any bugs or crashes, please send me the logs via the Terramity discord post and I'll help you as much as I can!

Enjoy!
